ddls:
CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor identification code */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "alert_count" INTEGER /* Count of alerts triggered during this period */,
  "user_count" INTEGER /* Count of users accessing the data */,
  "user_avg_speed" REAL /* Average speed of users accessing data */,
  "temperature_k" REAL /* Temperature in Kelvin */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in m/s */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Air quality index */,
  "pm_2_5_level" REAL /* PM2.5 level in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "pm_10_level" REAL /* PM10 level in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "noise_level" REAL /* Noise level in decibels */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., air quality, weather station) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was installed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the environmental data causing the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Detailed message of the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolver" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the environmental data being accessed */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of data access */,
  "query_params" TEXT /* Query parameters used to filter the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES environmental_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions granted to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Summary or path to the report data */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance event */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the maintenance performed */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Person who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_maintenance_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data_type" (
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., temperature, humidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the data type (e.g., Celsius, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that generated the reading */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the reading */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_readings_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES sensor_data_type ("data_type_id")
)
